Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Cormac]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Cormac is a Traveler of Endross in service to Overlord Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Cormac is a lean man in a hooded cloak with a brown cloak and purple shirt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Cormac is hairless, has pale skin, and luminous green eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Cormac is a Traveler of Endross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Cormac has poisonous green eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Cormac uses a hand-held thunderstorm as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Cormac's armor has Endross worked into it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Cormac is a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Cormac wields a thunderstorm in his right hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Cormac can summon a lightning-based serpent from his storm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Cormac can manipulate a storm to create thorned vines with blue sparks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Cormac stowed the prisoners in a Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Cormac was Malachi's only Endross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Cormac is a person who victimized Orlina.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Cormac killed Simon's mother during the collection of the sacrifice.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Cormac is an Endross Traveler who killed Simon's mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Leah was captured by the Endross Traveler, Cormac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Cormac was an unstable Endross Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Cormac was the legally appointed representative of Damasca.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
